nodes.label: Theobase Brand Cover Image (1640x720 OpenGraph/Social Share)
nodes.rationale: 1640x720 PNG image in branding directory for Theobase, the Seventh-day Adventist church administration platform. Dimensions match standard Open Graph / social share cover image (2:1 aspect ratio). Companion files in the same directory: logo-light.svg (orange #F97316 + gray #6B7280 wordmark), icon.svg (flame/torch icon in orange), favicon.ico, profile-picture.png, and theobase.af (Affinity Designer source). Actual visual content of cover.png is AMBIGUOUS â€” model cannot view images.

nodes.label: Theobase Brand Color Palette: Orange #F97316 + Gray #6B7280
nodes.rationale: Brand colors extracted from companion SVG files in the same branding directory. Logo-light.svg uses fill:rgb(249,115,22) for the icon and fill:rgb(107,114,128) for the wordmark text. The icon.svg uses fill:rgb(249,115,22) exclusively.

nodes.label: Theobase SDA Church Administration Platform
nodes.rationale: Theobase is a platform for Seventh-day Adventist church administration from Conference down to Member level, with modular architecture (Finance, Membership, Organization Structure, Auth/Roles, Audit/Reports). Built with React, TanStack Router, Vite, D1 (SQLite), and Cloudflare Workers.

nodes.label: Affinity Designer Source File
nodes.rationale: The file theobase.af in the branding directory is an Affinity Designer source file that likely contains the source art for the cover image and other branding assets.
